category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a tool to interact with the Phrase API.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is phrase-cli; official repository and Phrase documentation use Phrase CLI.
docs_sources: Official Phrase support documentation covers the CLI; official GitHub README is an additional documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/phrase/phrase-cli; repo intentionally not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables phrase/phrase-cli identify a CLI for the Phrase API and localization workflow.
